notes: Summer camp season only. "Summer 2026 will start on Monday, June 22nd, and ends on Friday, August 14th" plus an optional 9th week August 17–21. Buses arrive 8:55–9:10 AM, first activity at 9:30; "buses leave at 3:40 pm". Extended care available: morning 7:30–9:00 AM, afternoon 4:00–6:00 PM (extra enrollment). Also operates a School Year program. No weekend sessions.
